games.name: Transition
games.description: Find the right color of being and help him to find his purpose in life. Little creature is sad, because he does not know the meaning of his life. But one day, the magic come. You must help him to get to the platform in the same color. But you must pay attention to the time and the black platforms, because the game will end. ----- The game was created on Bratislava Game Jam 2016 and game won in category Attendee Choice. The theme of this event was the transition same as name of game.
games.instructions: click tap on right half of screen - go to right click tap on left half of screen - go to left

Avoid falling boxes, sharp thorns, and tricky obstacles as you explore mysterious dungeon worlds. Each level becomes harder, pushing you to think smarter, move quicker, and master the physics-based rotation system. Perfect for fans of escape games, monster adventure games, brain puzzles, and skill-based platformers.

games.name: PinPoint
games.description: PinPoint is a fast-paced precision arcade game where timing is everything. With every turn, you&amp;rsquo;re given a number &amp;mdash; and that&amp;rsquo;s exactly how many arrows you must launch at a rotating circle. The challenge? Each arrow must land cleanly without colliding into the others already in place. As the circle speeds up, slows down, or even changes direction, your reflexes and focus will be put to the test. Every perfect shot pushes your score higher, while a single wrong move ends the round. Key Features: Addictive one-tap gameplay that&amp;rsquo;s easy to learn, hard to master. Dynamic rotating circles with unpredictable patterns.
games.instructions: Throw at the right time never hit another stick
